<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Prilocaine 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of primary premature ejaculation in adult men.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>papillary conjunctivitis（99.8%）</li>
<li>manic bipolar affective disorder（99.8%）</li>
<li>bronchitis（99.6%）</li>
<li>migraine disorder（99.4%）</li>
<li>neuralgia（99.3%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（99.3%）</li>
<li>atopic eczema（99.3%）</li>
<li>allergic asthma（99.3%）</li>
<li>rhinitis（99.3%）</li>
<li>rosacea conjunctivitis（99.2%）</li>
<li>intrinsic asthma（99.2%）</li>
<li>nasal cavity disease（99.1%）</li>
<li>pharyngitis（99.0%）</li>
<li>transient ischemic attack (disease)（99.0%）</li>
<li>conjunctivitis（99.0%）</li>
<li>cauda equina syndrome（98.8%）</li>
<li>acute laryngopharyngitis（98.8%）</li>
<li>atopic conjunctivitis（98.8%）</li>
<li>blepharoconjunctivitis（98.7%）</li>
<li>Tourette syndrome（98.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/prilocaine/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
